title: Add a "Back to Top" Button to the Footer
description:
Task - Add a "Back to Top" Button to the Footer
File: src/components/Footer.tsx
What to do: Add a Back to Top button below the <VisitorCounter />. Clicking it should smoothly scroll the page back to the top.
Skills practiced: DOM event handler (window.scrollTo), MUI Button, basic sx styling.

changes.explanation: Add a centered "Back to Top" button after VisitorCounter that calls window.scrollTo with smooth scrolling on click, using the already-imported Button and Box components with variant="outlined" and mt
